seo.title: Atelier: AI Website Builder — Build a Stunning Site from Your iPhone
seo.description: Atelier turns a simple prompt into a polished, live website in minutes. No coding, no desktop required. Build portfolios, business pages, booking sites and more — all from your phone.
seo.ogTitle: Atelier: Launch a Beautiful Website in Minutes with AI
seo.ogDescription: From idea to live site in minutes. Atelier is the AI website builder designed for your phone — create, edit, and publish without code.

hero.h1:
Your Next Website
Starts with a Sentence.
hero.tagline: Atelier is an AI website builder that turns a simple prompt into a polished, live website — all from your iPhone. No coding, no design tools, no setup headaches. Just describe what you want and publish.

demo.h2: From Prompt to Published — In Minutes
demo.p1: We asked Atelier to build a website for a brand-new café opening near Central Park, New York — with a beautiful spring-inspired design. Here is what it created, instantly, from a single prompt on an iPhone.
demo.prompt_text: "Build a homepage for a new café opening near Central Park, New York. Use a beautiful spring-inspired design with soft pastels, cherry blossoms, and an inviting atmosphere. Include a welcome section, menu highlights, location info, and a reservation button."

features.h2: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't

items.title: Generate from a Prompt
items.desc: Describe your business, portfolio, or idea — Atelier builds a complete, multi-section website with clean layouts and real content.

items.title: Edit Without Code
items.desc: Tap to change text, rearrange sections, update images, and refine your design. Full creative control, zero technical knowledge required.

items.title: Publish Instantly
items.desc: Go live on a unique Atelier URL with one tap. Your site is immediately accessible to anyone, anywhere in the world.

items.title: Built for Mobile
items.desc: The entire workflow — from creation to publishing — is designed for your phone. Update your site from anywhere, anytime.

items.title: Perfect for Any Use Case
items.desc: Salons, restaurants, portfolios, booking pages, link pages, personal brands — Atelier adapts to your vision.

useCases.h2: Built for Creators, Entrepreneurs & Small Businesses

cta.h3: Your Website Is One Prompt Away
cta.p: Download Atelier for free and launch your site today.
